name: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation
notes: This Building Blocks is used to track Privilege Addition followed by Creation of a Privileged Container.
bb_references: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when Creation of a Privileged Container match at least 1 times with the same Source Address in 1 hour(s) after Abnormal Rights Assigned to Unauthorized Users match
thresholds: when Creation of a Privileged Container match at least 1 times with the same Source Address in 1 hour(s) after Abnormal Rights Assigned to Unauthorized Users match
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when Creation of a Privileged Container match at least 1 times with the same Source Address in 1 hour(s) after Abnormal Rights Assigned to Unauthorized Users match
